author: 一个无归期的人
quote_zh: 你的世界，我进不去。我的未来，你也不必参与。
quote_en: I can't get into your world. My future, you don't have to be a part of it.

author: Thomas Edison
quote_en: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
quote_zh: 天才是百分之一的灵感和百分之九十九的汗水。

author: Lao Tzu
quote_en: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.

author: Abraham Lincoln
quote_en: A house divided against itself cannot stand.
quote_zh: 有内讧的家不能存在；家和万事兴。

author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
quote_en: Difficulties increase the nearer we get to the goal.
quote_zh: 我们越接近目标，困难就越大。

author: Byron Pulsifer
quote_en: Fate is in your hands and no one elses
quote_zh: 命运掌握在你手中，没有其他人

author: Yogi Berra
quote_en: You can observe a lot just by watching.
quote_zh: 您可以通过观看来观察很多。
